(@P0 varchar(8000),@P1 varchar(8000),@P2 varchar(8000),@P3 nvarchar(4000),@P4 datetime2,@P5 varchar(8000),@P6 datetime2,@P7 decimal(38,0),@P8 varchar(8000),@P9 varchar(8000),@P10 varchar(8000),@P11 datetime2,@P12 datetime2,@P13 decimal(38,0),@P14 varchar(8000))insert into operational.src_msg_log (event_type,geml_version,ida_tracking_id,msg_content,msg_dt,msg_header,receive_dt,src_seq,src_system,src_tpc,src_tracking_id,sys_created_datetime,sys_updated_datetime,msg_id,msg_tpc) values ( @P0 , @P1 , @P2 , @P3 , @P4 , @P5 , @P6 , @P7 , @P8 , @P9 , @P10 , @P11 , @P12 , @P13 , @P14 )

(@P0 varchar(8000),@P1 varchar(8000),@P2 varchar(8000),@P3 nvarchar(max),@P4 datetime2,@P5 varchar(8000),@P6 datetime2,@P7 decimal(38,0),@P8 varchar(8000),@P9 varchar(8000),@P10 varchar(8000),@P11 datetime2,@P12 datetime2,@P13 decimal(38,0),@P14 varchar(8000))insert into operational.src_msg_log (event_type,geml_version,ida_tracking_id,msg_content,msg_dt,msg_header,receive_dt,src_seq,src_system,src_tpc,src_tracking_id,sys_created_datetime,sys_updated_datetime,msg_id,msg_tpc) values ( @P0 , @P1 , @P2 , @P3 , @P4 , @P5 , @P6 , @P7 , @P8 , @P9 , @P10 , @P11 , @P12 , @P13 , @P14 )

BEGIN TRANSACTION;          BEGIN TRY              DECLARE @rcount AS INT =1 WHILE @rcount > 0 BEGIN DELETE TOP (5000) sml from operational.src_msg_process smp,operational.src_msg_log sml                   where smp.msg_id=sml.msg_id and smp.msg_tpc=sml.msg_tpc and smp.sys_created_datetime < DATEADD(DAY, -15, cast(getDate() As Date))                   SET @rcount = @@ROWCOUNT END              DECLARE @rcount1 AS INT =1 WHILE @rcount1 > 0 BEGIN DELETE TOP (5000) from operational.src_msg_process                   where sys_created_datetime < DATEADD(DAY, -15, cast(getDate() As Date)) SET @rcount1 = @@ROWCOUNT END          END TRY          BEGIN CATCH              ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;          END CATCH;          IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0              COMMIT TRANSACTION;
